title: Dynamic Dropdown
excerpt:

posts.author: bglick (Bradley Glick)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use the Dropdown columns a lot for listing out vendors, companies, our employees, etc.

This can change often so we are wondering if there is a way to make a change to a master dropdown and it change to all the other boards. The problem we face now is every time we add a new employee or take on a new client, we are having to manually remember each board that has a dropdown column and add/remove from each.

Any help or a workaround would be greatly appreciated!

posts.author: JHconsultancy (Joseph Honig)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

You can do this using Make.com, When the master dropdown changes send a webhook to Make.com which will update the dropdown column on the boards you want.

Hope this helps

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml: Unfortunately you can’t programmatically delete labels from a dropdown (or status) column. Not even with Make, as there is no API support for deleting labels.
